plugin_desc: ZDNS DNS/GSLB network-service SNMP collection (local improved-snmp profile, ZDNS private PEN 39810 plus F5 BIG-IP LTM PEN 3375 objects). Beyond standard MIB-II / IF-MIB uptime and 64-bit HC interface traffic, it collects ZDNS private scalar health — CPU utilization, memory utilization and CPU temperature — plus DNS/DHCP/NTP/ZWP/TFTP service status and F5 LTM virtual-server, node, pool and pool-member availability states, normalized to 1=healthy / 2=fault. Query success rate, cache hit rate, recursion count and disk usage are business or capacity indicators, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Average CPU utilization of the ZDNS appliance from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.1, reported directly as a percentage.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilization of the ZDNS appliance from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.2, reported directly as a percentage.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: CPU temperature of the ZDNS appliance from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.4, reported directly in degrees Celsius.

metrics.name: network_service_dns_service_state
metrics.description: DNS service state normalized from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.5. Value 1 is healthy; every other value is treated as fault.

metrics.name: network_service_dhcp_service_state
metrics.description: DHCP service state normalized from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.6.

metrics.name: network_service_ntp_service_state
metrics.description: NTP service state normalized from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.7.

metrics.name: network_service_zwp_service_state
metrics.description: ZWP service state normalized from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.12.

metrics.name: network_service_tftp_service_state
metrics.description: TFTP service state normalized from ZDNS private OID 39810.100.1.13.

metrics.name: network_service_virtual_server_state
metrics.description: F5 LTM virtual-server availability state from 3375.2.2.10.1.2.1.22, normalized green(1)=healthy and all other values=fault.

metrics.name: network_service_node_state
metrics.description: F5 LTM node availability state from 3375.2.2.4.3.2.1.3, normalized green(1)=healthy and all other values=fault.

metrics.name: network_service_pool_state
metrics.description: F5 LTM pool availability state from 3375.2.2.5.5.2.1.2, normalized green(1)=healthy and all other values=fault.

metrics.name: network_service_pool_member_state
metrics.description: F5 LTM pool-member availability state from 3375.2.2.5.6.2.1.5, normalized green(1)=healthy and all other values=fault.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: Incoming interface traffic rate from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: Outgoing interface traffic rate from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter.

metrics.name: device_total_incoming_traffic
metrics.description: Device total incoming traffic rate summed from 64-bit IF-MIB HC counters.

metrics.name: device_total_outgoing_traffic
metrics.description: Device total outgoing traffic rate summed from 64-bit IF-MIB HC counters.
